mapper.insert: insert into recharge_record (user_id, order_no, amount, method, pay_status, create_time, update_time) values (#{userId}, #{orderNo}, #{amount}, #{method}, #{payStatus}, now(), now())
mapper.update:
update recharge_record
pay_status = #{payStatus},
complete_time = now(),
update_time = now()
where order_no = #{orderNo}
